text.title: Interview Recording Redaction Pipeline Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply interview-recording-redaction-pipeline end-to-end. Each step pins input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: check-applies-if
step.input: Engagement context + applies_if conditions from AGENTS.md
step.action: Verify every applies_if predicate holds; if any fails, route to step 5 (skip).
step.decision-gate: If any applies_if fails OR any skip_if matches → step 5 (skip with reason).

step.name: gather-prerequisites
step.action: Collect every prerequisite artefact; reject step if any is missing or unreadable.
step.decision-gate: If any prerequisite is unreadable / unavailable → halt + surface 'needs-clarification'.

step.name: draft-artefact
step.input: prerequisite_bundle + rules from content/01-core-rules.xml + decision tree from content/06-decision-tree.xml
step.action: Apply rules, populate output_payload per templates, attach evidence per rule.

step.name: validate-output
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-interview-recording-redaction-pipeline.py --file draft.json`; on failure, surface violations + reroute to step 3.
step.decision-gate: If validation fails twice consecutively → escalate to human reviewer.

step.name: commit-or-skip
step.action: Persist artefact to engagement log; if skipped, persist skip reason instead.
